    Tower(int width, int maxHeight)
    name: Tower use int: width (width of the tower and canvas); int maxHeight (height of the tower and canvas starts a new instance of the class and creates de canvas returns nothing

    name: height use nothing Calculate and give the tower's height returns the total height of the tower

    makeInvisible()
    name: makeInvisible use nothing Hace invisible el simulador y oculta todos los elementos returns nothing

    name: makeVisible use nothing Hace visible el simulador.
    void
    orderTower()
    name: orderTower use nothing Order tower from largest to smallest (mayor a menor) returns nothing
    void
    popCup()
    name: popCup use nothing removes the last cup on cups and items lists returns nothign
    void
    popLid()
    name: popLid use nothing Removes the last lid on lids and items lists returns nothing
    void
    pushCup(int i)
    name: pushCup use int : i (given cup identifier) adds a "cup" on the items list (with type "cup" and real size) and cups list (only size) returns nothing
    void
    pushLid(int i)
    pushLid genera una tapa del tamaño correspondiente a una copa.
    void
    removeCup(int i)
    name: removeCup use int : i (given cup identifier to remove) removes the cup with given "id" returns nothing
    void
    removeLid(int i)
    name: removeLid use int : i (given lid identifier to remove) removes the specific lid on lids and items lists returns nothing
    void
    reverseTower()
    name: reverseTower use nothing Order tower from smallest to largest (menor a mayor) returns nothing
    String[][]
    stackingItems()

    • pushCup

      public void pushCup(int i)
      name: pushCup use int : i (given cup identifier) adds a "cup" on the items list (with type "cup" and real size) and cups list (only size) returns nothing

    • popCup

      public void popCup()
      name: popCup use nothing removes the last cup on cups and items lists returns nothign

      name: removeLid use int : i (given lid identifier to remove) removes the specific lid on lids and items lists returns nothing

      public void orderTower()
      name: orderTower use nothing Order tower from largest to smallest (mayor a menor) returns nothing

      public void reverseTower()
      name: reverseTower use nothing Order tower from smallest to largest (menor a mayor) returns nothing

      name: height use nothing Calculate and give the tower's height returns the total height of the tower

    • makeVisible

      public void makeVisible()
      name: makeVisible use nothing Hace visible el simulador. Si la torre no cabe, muestra mensaje de error returns nothing

      public void makeInvisible()
      name: makeInvisible use nothing Hace invisible el simulador y oculta todos los elementos returns nothing
